task_completion.description: Load the ToothGrowth.csv dataset into Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application is open and displays the ToothGrowth dataset, with columns such as 'len' visible in the spreadsheet view.

task_completion.description: Set the dependent variable and test value for the One Sample T-Test
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the One Sample T-Test analysis panel, the variable 'len' is placed in the 'Dependent Variables' box, and the 'Test Value' input field is set to 20.

task_completion.description: Select the required statistical tests and options
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the analysis panel, the checkboxes for 'Student's', 'Wilcoxon rank', 'Mean difference', 'Effect size', 'Confidence interval', and 'Descriptives' are selected.
In the analysis panel under 'Assumption Checks', the checkboxes for 'Normality' (Shapiro-Wilk) and 'Q-Q plot' are selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the results are generated and displayed
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand results panel displays the One Sample T-Test results, including tables for the t-test, Descriptives, Normality Test, and a Q-Q plot.

task_completion.description: Save the analysis results to the specified file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or the main Jamovi window title indicates the file is being saved or has been saved as 'OneSampleTTest_ToothGrowth.omv' in the /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi application interface (menus, panels, checkboxes) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The results appear to be genuinely generated by Jamovi
integrity.visual_evidence: The results displayed in the Jamovi output panel have the correct formatting, tables, and plots expected from the software, rather than manually typed or pasted text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal commands (e.g., python scripts or file manipulation) to create the .omv file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: ToothGrowth.csv. Variable: 'len'. Test value: 20. Required options: Student's t, Wilcoxon rank, mean difference, effect size, confidence interval, descriptives, Shapiro-Wilk (normality), and Q-Q plot. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/OneSampleTTest_ToothGrowth.omv.
